text.autoconfig.fakemainhand.title: Fake Main Hand
text.autoconfig.fakemainhand.option.armS:
Main hand on server side and other players.
You may have to rejoin the server to apply this.
 LEFT - Left hand
 RIGHT - Right hand
text.autoconfig.fakemainhand.option.armC:
Main hand on client side (yourself).
 LEFT - Left hand
 RIGHT - Right hand
